title: Sensitive File Exposed: /backup.zip
fix: Never store backup files in the web root. Move to a secure off-site location and restrict access.

title: Missing HTTP Security Headers
fix: Add these headers to your web server configuration:Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomainsX-Frame-Options: DENYX-Content-Type-Options: nosniffReferrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin

title: Clickjacking Vulnerability
fix: Add: X-Frame-Options: DENY or use CSP: Content-Security-Policy: frame-ancestors 'none'

title: Server Version Disclosure (Server)
fix: Remove or mask the Server header. Apache: set ServerTokens Prod and ServerSignature Off in httpd.conf.

title: Sensitive File Exposed: /.DS_Store
fix: Remove macOS metadata files from the server.
